@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser_async_await_refactor)
C: same_order ∧ one_next(err)
P: validate_id → promisify(db.findUser) → handle_not_found → await(audit.log)
V: success_path ∧ missing_id_401 ∧ db_error_next(err)
R: ! this_binding_risk ∧ ! callback_signature_drift
A: async_await

[AUDIT]
Refactor loadUser async await refactor to async/await with minimal behavior change, preserve same validation order, single next(err) path, and verify the single next(err) path.
